description_long: This is a rectangular, upright filing cabinet with a wood-textured exterior, featuring two vertically stacked drawers. The front face displays a pair of subtle horizontal lines indicating the drawer separations, and one side has upward-pointing arrow markings, suggesting handling instructions. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing additional items. The cabinet appears robust and boxy, with no visible handles or label holders, giving it a minimalist appearance. Its construction suggests it is designed for storing documents or files in an organized manner, likely in an office or archive setting.
description: A wood-textured, two-drawer filing cabinet with a flat top and minimalist design, featuring subtle drawer separations and handling markings.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat, wood-textured surface with a faint horizontal line indicating the separation between two drawers.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the vertical seam between the drawers and the cabinet body, with no visible handles or label holders.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays upward-pointing arrow markings and some faint text, indicating handling instructions.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this side shows the vertical seam and the lower part of the cabinet, with no additional features visible.
